svg.title: Benchmark Comparison by Scenario
svg.desc: linux 6.17.0-14-generic (x64) | Intel(R) Core(TM) Ultra 9 285K | 24 logical cores | Node v22.22.1 | pnpm 10.32.1

text.tspan: linux 6.17.0-14-generic (x64) | Intel(R) Core(TM) Ultra 9 285K | 24 logical cores | Node v22.22.1 |
Per-scenario throughput delta, sorted from best improvement to worst regression.
Table Utilities - Table data edge cases /
Remend Parser - medium text with mixed
Remend Parser - long text with complex
Remend Parser - short text with incomplete

svg.text: Green = local faster, red = reference faster. Metric uses throughput delta: ((local hz / reference hz) - 1) * 100.
